attributes.description: Alerts when error/crit/alert/emerg log count exceeds 50 in 15 minutes. Operational errors beyond normal noise.
attributes.name: [Nginx OTel] Error log spike

investigation_guide.blob:
## NGINX error log spike

### What fired
More than 50 high-severity error log entries in 15 minutes.

### Why it matters
Bursts of severe errors signal upstream timeouts, configuration problems, FD exhaustion, or permission issues. Access log 5xx rates often lag behind error log spikes.

### Triage
1. Sample the dominant error message.
2. Correlate with upstream / backend health.

### Remediation
- Fix the upstream or config issue.

### Tuning
- 50 errors/15m; tune to baseline noise.
